entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The legume crop being studied for stability and adaptability in Ethiopia

entities.name: ETHIOPIA
entities.description: The country where the research on chickpea agroecological zones was conducted

entities.name: AGROECOLOGICAL ZONES
entities.description: Divergent environmental zones used to assess the adaptability and discrimination power of chickpea

entities.name: GERMPLASM POOL
entities.description: The collection of genetic resources being restructured for breeding strategies

entities.name: ECONOMICAL YIELD
entities.description: A key performance trait used to evaluate the response of chickpea genotypes

entities.name: AMMI STABILITY VALUE
entities.description: A statistical method used to discriminate genotypes based on their stability

entities.name: STABILITY INDEX
entities.description: A metric used to evaluate and discriminate the stability of genotypes

entities.name: GENOTYPES
entities.description: The specific genetic entries of chickpea evaluated across different environments

entities.name: ENVIRONMENT
entities.description: External factors that, along with genetics, influence crop performance and stability

entities.name: GENETICS
entities.description: Internal genetic factors that influence crop performance and stability

entities.name: STABILITY ANALYSIS
entities.description: The overall analytical approach used to scope adaptability and structure breeding germplasm
